---
title: "IPVS"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-11"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Packages

```{r}
library(arrow) 
library(readr) 
library(dplyr) 
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
```

## Dataset

```{r}
ipvs <- read_parquet("C:/Users/alyss/Desktop/Brasil/Analysis/dados_current - 2026-06-09/Dados/resultados/contextual/ipvs_municipios_sp.parquet")
```

### Missingness

```{r}
sum(is.na(ipvs))
```

## Clean

```{r}
ipvs <- ipvs |>
  mutate(
    ipvs_low = 
      ipvs_pct_grupo1 + ipvs_pct_grupo2,
    ipvs_medium =
      ipvs_pct_grupo3 + ipvs_pct_grupo4,
    ipvs_high =
      ipvs_pct_grupo5 + ipvs_pct_grupo6)

```

## Distribution of High IPVS

```{r}
ipvs_summary <- ipvs %>%
  select(ipvs_high) %>%
  rename(value = ipvs_high) %>%
  mutate(
    Quartile = ntile(desc(value), 4)
  ) %>%
  group_by(Quartile) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    pct = round(100 * n() / nrow(ipvs), 1),
    Median = median(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    Min = min(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Variable = "IPVS High",
    Range = paste0(round(Min, 2), "-", round(Max, 2))
  ) %>%
  select(Variable, Quartile, n, pct, Median, Range)

ipvs_summary
```

## Neat Table

```{r}
ipvs_summary %>%
  kable(
    digits = 1,
    caption = "Distribution of Municipalities by High/Very High IPVS",
    col.names = c(
      "High IPVS",
      "Quartile",
      "n",
      "%",
      "Median (%)",
      "Range"
    )
  ) %>%
  collapse_rows(columns = 1) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
```

## Normality

```{r}
ipvs_vars <- c("ipvs_low", "ipvs_medium", "ipvs_high")

ipvs %>%
  select(all_of(ipvs_vars)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = "ipvs",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = value)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 20) +
  facet_wrap(~ ipvs, scales = "free") +
  theme_minimal()
```
